home.headline: Ourika Camp
home.subtitle: A warm retreat at the gates of Marrakech, where elegance and authenticity meet for an unforgettable experience

roomsPage.title: Our Rooms
roomsPage.intro: Discover our selection of rooms and suites combining the charm of Marrakech with modern comfort. Each space has been designed to offer a warm and authentic atmosphere, while meeting the highest standards of comfort. Whether you're traveling as a couple, with family, or with friends, you'll find the ideal accommodation for an unforgettable stay in Marrakech.

double.title: Room 01
double.desc: Room 01 is one of the on-property guest rooms available for travelers who want a fixed room stay instead of camping.

triplePool.title: Room 02
triplePool.desc: Room 02 offers another on-site room option for guests looking for a simple and comfortable stay on the property.

juniorSuite.title: Room 03
juniorSuite.desc: Room 03 highlights another room available directly at Camping Tissirt for visitors who prefer indoor accommodation.

familySuite.title: Room 01
familySuite.desc: This room listing uses the Room 01 photo set as an additional on-property room option in the current gallery.

roomsHome.heading: Rooms On The Property
roomsHome.sub: Camping Tissirt also offers on-site rooms for guests who want more fixed comfort while staying in the same calm setting.

reviews.heading: Guest Reviews
reviews.sub: Real impressions from our recent guests.

items.text: Many thanks for the excellent service at the hotel. I particularly appreciated the professionalism and kindness of the staff, which made my stay even more enjoyable. The spaciousness of the establishment is also a plus, offering comfort and freedom. Well done and all the best.

Excellent experience.I was there with friends a few weeks ago to rest, we were not disappointed!Warm and welcoming staff, quality and affordable food, large pool and more generally very charming hotel.

Very good atmosphere. Quality dishes and you can swim in peace in a beautiful pool listening to good music. To do with family or even friends. There are even activities for children (ping pong, basketball...)

booking.invalid: Please choose a check-out date after check-in.

gallery.heading: Gallery
gallery.sub: A glimpse of colors and calm.

location.heading: A peaceful haven at the city's doorstep
location.desc: Ourika Camp keeps you close to the buzzing souks and historic medina while offering the elegance and calm of an exclusive retreat.
points: A peaceful haven close to the city's must-see attractions
At the gateway to the Ourika Valley and the Atlas Mountains — perfect for unforgettable getaways
Spacious rooms combining modern comfort with authentic charm

haven.heading: Facilities & Amenities
haven.intro: 🌟  Blending leisure and tradition, whether solo or with family, for a short getaway or a longer stay, Ourika Camp offers a unique setting to enjoy Marrakech’s sunshine and authentic way of life.

cards.title: Leisure & Relaxation
cards.body:
Two large swimming pools available year-round: enjoy swimming in every season, with sun loungers and daybeds for ultimate relaxation under the sun or in the shade.

Playground area: table tennis, basketball hoop, and trampoline to entertain both kids and adults.

cards.title: Authentic Spaces
cards.body: Traditional Caïdal tent: a unique venue to share convivial moments, gather with friends, or host private events in an authentic Moroccan atmosphere.

cards.title: Comfort & Security
cards.body: Private and secured parking (60+ spaces): spacious, monitored parking to ensure peace of mind for all guests.

cards.title: Culinary Experience
cards.body: À la carte restaurant: enjoy a varied international cuisine, combining local flavors and global dishes. Open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner in a warm, welcoming atmosphere.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.sub: Questions, group bookings, or special requests—we're happy to help.

sections.p: These terms and conditions govern the sales by the company Rent-Here of service provisions in the field of tourism and hospitality.

Rates apply to the number of guests specified on the room page, per night, and include applicable VAT, breakfast (where applicable), and free Wi-Fi access. Local taxes (tourist tax) are not included and will be added at payment. Rates may be displayed in several currencies for reference; billing is made exclusively in Moroccan dirhams (MAD). If another currency is shown or used, the exchange rate applied is the one in effect at the time of transaction, according to the official rate set by the bank or payment provider.
In addition to the room rate, guests must pay the following local taxes (per person, per night, unless otherwise specified for children under local regulations):
bullets: Tourism Promotion Tax (TPT) — paid to ONMT: 11 MAD per person, per night.
Municipal / City Tax — paid to the Municipality of Marrakech: 15 MAD per person, per night (for guests over 12 years old).
sections.note: These taxes will be added to the final invoice at payment. They are collected by the property and remitted to the competent authorities (Municipality of Marrakech and ONMT).

sections.p: Non-Refundable Rates: no cancellation, modification, or refund for any reason. In case of cancellation, modification, or no-show, the full stay is charged. Flexible Rates (7 days): free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival. If cancelled later or in case of no-show, the total amount of the reservation is charged. Any change is subject to availability and written confirmation from the property.

Confirming your booking implies an obligation to pay the indicated price. Payment is made by credit card through the secure PAYZONE system. Accepted cards: Visa and Mastercard. The card is charged at the time of booking.

A valid passport is required for all travellers, including children. The maximum duration of a tourist stay is three months. Some nationalities may require a visa—please check with the Moroccan consulate/embassy before departure. Under Moroccan law, proof of marriage may be required for couples of Moroccan nationality or nationals of Muslim countries wishing to stay in the same room.
